x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: TPRM assignment groups ensure AI Agent task routing and Now Assist escalations reach the correct risk and vendor management teams. Without properly configured groups, automated assignments from AI-generated risk actions will fail or go unaddressed.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure TPRM assignment groups aligned to risk tiers and vendor categories.
